name: Tomato Herb Toasts
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Ripe tomatoes, preferably a variety of colors (marvel-striped, green zebra, Ida-gold, lemon boy, etc.)
1/4 cup Chopped fresh herb (basil, tarragon, thyme, parsley)
recipeInstructions:
1. Macerate the chopped onion in 1 tablespoon each vinegar with a little salt for at least 30 minutes.
2. Blanch tomatoes in boiling water for about 20 seconds. Cool, peel, seed and coarsely chop. Season lightly with salt; drain.
3. Prepare a vinaigrette with olive oil, onion, and vinegars, salt, pepper, and some herbs.
4. Just before serving, dress the tomatoes with the vinaigrette and adjust seasoning.
5. Grill bread on both sides. Spoon tomato mixture onto toasts and garnish with herbs.
